description: CompositionPurple and white checked half-sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, has shoulder panels, two chest pockets with red stitch detailing and discreet print of 'Kansas City' on the left pocket, a full length buttoned placket, brand name printed on the right sleeve and a curved hemlineFittingSlimWash careMachine wash in cold water inside out using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach or wringTumble dry or flat dry inside out in shadeWarm ironDo not iron on print/embellishmentsChecks that add immense style to your casual look is what lee brings into your life. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with denims or corduroys and funky footwear for casual looks.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight: 6'; Shoulder 18"
